subcodes.first_line: O dearly beloved friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Five and twenty years ago certain verses flowed from the Pen of the Covenant, and one verse thereof [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عزیز عبدالبهاء بیست و پنج سال پیش اشعاری از قلم میثاق صادر یک بیت از
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @poems and quotation from poetry
